rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §33.0832 governs UIL participation eligibility for non-enrolled students. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no overlapping operative provisions.
quote: Sec. 33.0832. EQUAL OPPORTUNITY FOR CERTAIN STUDENTS TO PARTICIPATE IN UNIVERSITY INTERSCHOLASTIC LEAGUE ACTIVITIES.
_note: No conflict; proposed homestead exemption change has no nexus to UIL participation statute.
